# Nua.CSS

> Nua.CSS is a lightweight, mobile-first CSS reset framework designed to provide consistent styling across modern web browsers while preserving useful browser defaults and optimising performance.

Nua.CSS is maintained by OSTARA.WORK and distributed as free and open-source software.

## Website

* https://nua-css.pages.dev/
* https://nua-css.pages.dev/mobile-first-css-reset-stylesheet

## Download

* https://nua-css.pages.dev/assets/css/nua.min.css
* https://www.npmjs.com/package/nua-css

## Source Code

* https://github.com/OSTARA711/nua-css

## Documentation

* https://nua-css.pages.dev/mobile-first-css-reset-stylesheet

## Features

* Mobile-first CSS reset
* Cross-browser consistency
* Simplified box model
* Responsive image support
* Accessibility-focused defaults
* Lightweight and fast loading
* Open-source development

## Author

* Saskia Ostermann Toutatis
* https://ostara.work

* https://github.com/OSTARA711/nua-css/blob/main/LICENSE
